suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to set skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false whenever required interactive checks are skipped, and to include interactiveChecks evidence whenever followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for misc-chain-dropdown-polish found no Playwright/manual checks despite client-side behavior changes, but handoff marked followedProcedure=true with no interactiveChecks evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Make gas-price cache constants configurable via feature flags/environment variables.
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking optimization with no demonstrated operational need in this milestone
